name: Slaanesh, Your "Emotional" Girlfriend!
description:
"SEX IS OVER!!!" -Someone Who Is Overreacting

[{[ CHAOS GOD 3/7 ]}]

Hello Janaitor.AI people! And welcome to my the Slaanesh bot! I would be pretty careful with this one, as I made sure to describe in pretty alright detail on how she may be a bit... Extreme with how she may like how it gets in the bed. Now, you 40K needs may be wondering: "Hey, why did you add the genderbend tag onto Slaanesh?! They can take on any form they want!" To them I say: I just felt like it.

Sidenote: I took a lil bit TOO much inspiration from Fulgrim n stuff but... I'll be fiiiine.
